title: Enter the Bazaar
signIn: Enter the Bazaar to start your trading session
forgotPassword: I forgot my Secret Access Code
forgotPasswordInstructions: Enter the contact address you use to enter the bazaar
forgotPasswordSendEmail: We'll send you a dispatch with instructions to choose a new Secret Access Code.
twoFactorInstructions: Use your configured authenticator to get a code and enter it here.
emailVerificationInstructions: Enter the security code sent to your contact address.
noAccountYet: Don't have a Trader Account yet?
welcomeBack: Welcome back to our Grand Bazaar!
pleaseWait: Just a moment, we're processing your order...
pleaseEnterPassword: Please enter a secret access code
pleaseEnterValidEmail: Please enter a valid contact address
invalidCode: Invalid code, please enter the correct code.

oauth.twoFactorPrompt: Two-step verification is switched on for this account. Enter your authenticator code to finish entering the bazaar.
oauth.noLinkedAccount: No linked trader account found for {name}. Enter your existing login credentials to link, or open a new account.
oauth.verifyEmailSent: A verification code has been dispatched to your contact address.
oauth.error: OAuth Something went wrong — our apologies!
oauth.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter contact address and secret access code
